svg.title: SkyTicker — OTP-based attendance marking flow
svg.desc: Request flow from React QR display through OTP validation to PostgreSQL persistence

g.text: POST /api/otp/generate → backend creates OTPVerification record with expiry → returns OTP token
QR encodes: sessionId + OTP token — displayed on screen, not sent to a device
3 · Student scans QR with phone camera
Phone camera decodes QR → student's browser/app submits sessionId + OTP to backend
Extracts student identity from JWT → sets SecurityContext → passes to controller
a) OTPVerificationRepository.findByToken() → check expiry and validity
OTP valid & not expired & no duplicate?
save(Attendance{student, session, timestamp, PRESENT}) — audited by AuditInfoProvider
